title: The Union Duties of Excise (Distribution) Act, 1979
full_text: The Union Duties of Excise (Distribution) Act, 1979 संघ उत्‍पाद-शुल्‍क (वितरण) अधिनियम, 1979 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197924 Act Number: 24 Enactment Date: 1979-05-20 Act Year: 1979 Short Title: The Union Duties of Excise (Distribution) Act, 1979 Hindi Title: संघ उत्‍पाद-शुल्‍क (वितरण) अधिनियम, 1979 Long Title: An Act to provide for the payment out of the Consolidated Fund of India of sums equivalent to a part of the net proceeds of certain Union duties of excise to the States to which the law imposing the duty extends and for the distribution of those sums among those States in accordance with the principles recommended by the Finance Commission in its report dated the 25th day of November, 1994. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Revenue Enforcement Date: 01-04-1979 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Union Duties of Excise (Distribution) Act, 1979 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definition. Section 3. Payment to States of sums equivalent to a part of the net proceeds of Union duties of excise and distribution of sums among them. Section 4. Payment to be charged on the Consolidated Fund of India. Section 5. Power to make rules. Section 6. Repeal.
